import json, sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('data/items.json'\) as f:
    items = json.load\(f\)
imported = {i['qid'] for i in items}
linked = set\(\)
for item in items:
    for t in item['triples']:
        if t['value']['type'] == 'wikibase-item':
            linked.add\(t['value']['value']\)
unresolved = linked - imported
print\(f'Imported QIDs: {len\(imported\)}'\)
print\(f'Linked QIDs \(wikibase-item values\): {len\(linked\)}'\)
print\(f'Already imported: {len\(linked & imported\)}'\)
print\(f'Need to fetch: {len\(unresolved\)}'\)
print\(f'First 20: {sorted\(unresolved\)[:20]}'\)
")

Bash(cd C:/Users/Immanuelle/Documents/Github/embedding-mapping && python -c "
import json, sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('data/items.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    items = json.load\(f\)
full = [i for i in items if i['triples']]
linked = [i for i in items if not i['triples']]
total_triples = sum\(len\(i['triples']\) for i in full\)
total_quals = sum\(sum\(len\(t.get\('qualifiers',[]\)\) for t in i['triples']\) for i in full\)
total_srcs = sum\(sum\(len\(t.get\('sources',[]\)\) for t in i['triples']\) for i in full\)
print\(f'Full items: {len\(full\)}'\)
print\(f'Linked-only items: {len\(linked\)}'\)
print\(f'Total triples: {total_triples}'\)
print\(f'Total qualifiers: {total_quals}'\)
print\(f'Total sources: {total_srcs}'\)
")

    if pid in t:
        print\(f'\\n{pid} \({t[pid][\\"label\\"]}\):'\)

")
